name: TV
description:
Client is a diabetic patient who also experiences ongoing gastrointestinal issues. She suffers from frequent diarrhoea and urinary urgency, which has resulted in her needing to use diapers daily. The client often feels physically weak, making it difficult for her to secure stable employment.
She is known to SSO and currently receives financial assistance. While she has adequate informal support, the client prefers not to trouble her support network and will only seek help when she has insufficient funds. She stays alone in a rental flat.

name: Double stroller

The parents are currently unemployed with father taking ad-hoc jobs. They hope to receive a double stroller so that it will be easier to manage bringing their 2 young children out. Delivery costs to be borne by donor please as family is unable to pay for delivery.

Your donation of a double stroller is extremely appreciated.

name: single mattress
description:
The client is experiencing significant caregiving stress in managing her 16-year-old son alongside her 21-year-old son with special needs. The family is also facing financial constraints, as the client’s husband is the sole breadwinner with a limited income. 

Recently, the client’s 21-year-old son urinated on the mattress. The provision of super single mattress would greatly support the family by restoring a basic level of comfort and functionality in their home.

name: L shape sofa
description: The family is seeking an L‑shaped sofa to replace their current sofa, which is damaged and no longer usable. As a family of five living in a compact 2‑room rental flat, they do not have sufficient seating or a proper resting area. This is particularly important for the mother, who has chronic back pain and significant caregiver fatigue, and requires appropriate support to rest safely. Due to financial difficulties—including reduced SSO assistance, unstable household income, medical costs, and tight monthly budgets—the family is unable to purchase a replacement. Donor to kindly cover transport arrangement and delivery cost please thank you!
